picks.title: LLM2CLIP: Powerful Language Model Unlocks Richer Cross-Modality Representation
picks.takeaway: 用大语言模型提升CLIP跨模态表示，提出新训练范式
picks.why: 开源且效果显著，对多模态和大模型研究有直接推动

picks.title: Fit Pixels, Get Labels: Meta-learned Implicit Networks for Image Segmentation
picks.takeaway: 元学习隐式网络用于医学图像分割，仅需像素级标签
picks.why: 方法简洁高效，在有限标注下表现优异，医学影像实用价值高

picks.title: GigaPath-Flash and GigaTIME-Flash: Efficient Pathology Foundation Models for Whole-Slide and Tumor Microenvironment Analysis
picks.takeaway: 高效病理全切片基础模型，支持空间蛋白质组学预测
picks.why: 微软出品，模型开源，计算效率高，推动计算病理学发展

picks.title: How Does Alignment Tuning Shape Representations of Sycophancy and Related Cue-Induced Biases in LLMs?
picks.takeaway: 研究对齐训练如何导致LLM的谄媚偏差，分析内部表示
picks.why: 揭示对齐副作用，为改进RLHF提供重要见解

picks.title: O-VAD: Industrial Video Anomaly Detection through Object-Centric Tracking and Reasoning
picks.takeaway: 无需训练的agentic框架用于工业视频异常检测，追踪物体状态
picks.why: 被ECCV 2026接收，方法新颖，可解释性强，工业应用前景好
